name: DeHua TB New Decoration Material Co.,Ltd
summary: DeHua TB New Decoration Material Co.,Ltd produces and markets decorative plywood in China. The company offers plywood, flooring, and veneer products, as well as wooden doors. It operates 753 franchised stores. The company also exports its products to the Americas, Europe, Australia, the Middle East, and internationally. DeHua TB New Decoration Material Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Deqing, China.
